name: Mission Chinese Food
description: A bold, energetic restaurant known for creative Chinese-American dishes, family-style menus, and a lively dining room.

name: Emily
description: A cosy Brooklyn pizza restaurant serving wood-fired pies, salads, starters, and a well-known burger.

name: Kang Ho Dong Baekjeong
description: A Korean BBQ restaurant with tabletop grills, generous sides, and a menu built for groups and birthdays.

name: Katz's Delicatessen
description: A classic New York delicatessen famous for pastrami, rye bread, large sandwiches, and counter service.
address: 205 E Houston St, New York, NY 10002

name: Roberta's Pizza
description: A Brooklyn food-scene staple serving pizzas, seasonal vegetable dishes, salads, and charcuterie.

name: Hometown BBQ
description: A spacious Texas-style barbecue restaurant known for smoked brisket, ribs, pork tacos, and lamb dishes.

name: Superiority Burger
description: A tiny vegetarian spot turning seasonal vegetables into satisfying riffs on American comfort food.

name: The Dutch
description: A quintessential American restaurant with steaks, burgers, oysters, seafood, and pasta in Soho.

name: Mu Ramen
description: A ramen shop known for rich tonkotsu broth, high-minded small plates, and Japanese beef specials.

name: Casa Enrique
description: A laid-back Mexican restaurant in Long Island City known for tacos, mole, crab tostadas, and desserts.
